div1.entryFree: Rivet, vb. to fasten with rivets: a thousand have on their --ed trim, Ant. IV, 4, 22 (their armours). Metaphorically, == to fasten strongly: --ed with faith unto your flesh, Merch. V, 169. I mine eyes will r. to his face, Hml. III, 2, 90. that's --ed, screwed to my memory, Cymb. II, 2, 43.
